message:
fix: add WriteZero retry to Anthropic provider and reduce idle worker threads

Port the same WriteZero retry logic from openai.rs/openai_responses.rs
to anthropic.rs: tolerate up to 5 consecutive transient WriteZero errors
in the SSE stream before treating as fatal. This prevents auto-continue
failures when TLS buffers cause spurious Ok(0) writes.

Also reduce blocking_threads from (1,8) to (1,2) in main.rs and
pi_debug.rs to mitigate high idle CPU from asupersync worker polling
until the upstream park_timeout fix propagates.

Closes #15, closes #16

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
